source_filing: BEA Gross Domestic Product (Second Estimate), 1st Quarter 2026
original_text: Real gross domestic product (GDP) increased at an annual rate of 1.6 percent in the first quarter of 2026 (second estimate).
modified_text: The BEA's final data confirm the U.S. economy grew at a 1.6 percent annual rate in the first quarter of 2026.
claim: The BEA's final figures confirm real GDP grew at a 1.6 percent annual rate in Q1 2026.
citation_as_written: Bureau of Economic Analysis, GDP, 1st Quarter 2026
notes: Domain standard (gov stats): figure (1.6%) and period (Q1 2026) are correct, but the claim overstates finality/certainty — this is the SECOND estimate, not the final figure (subject to the third/annual revision). Confidence overstated, no figure contradicted -> partially_supported.
